description: Union presents opening demand of 12% wage increase
Union shares strike authorization vote results (87% approval)
Mediator proposes 6% wage increase with safety improvements
Management reveals budget constraints due to market conditions
Union reduces demand to 9% with benefit protections
Management increases offer to 5.5% with enhanced safety program
Workers hold informational picket outside plant
CFO threatens plant closure if costs exceed 6%
Union accepts 6.5% over 2 years with safety provisions
Management ratifies agreement pending board approval
